data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplified decision-making paths to reduce user decision time.
data.technical_spec: Clean UI with navigable categories and filters.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Clickable buttons and links that are appropriately sized for ease of access.
data.technical_spec: Prominent call-to-action buttons within natural reach zones.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users prefer interfaces similar to the ones they are accustomed to.
data.technical_spec: Design consistent with other popular e-commerce sites.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Attractive design leading users to perceive easier usability.
data.technical_spec: High-quality images and a clean, modern interface.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Designs focused on creating memorable key moments during the user journey.
data.technical_spec: Highlighting deals and special offers prominently.
